transcript.text: Hi, this is Alex, an AI voice agent from Flawless. I'm calling about your recent inquiry. Is now a good time?
Sure, go ahead.
Great. Are you currently using any AI tools in your sales process?
Yes, we use a couple of tools.
What's your biggest challenge with them?
Speed and accuracy, mainly.
Got it. Do you have a budget allocated for improving this?
Yes, we have budget for this quarter.
Perfect. I'd love to connect you with our team. Would Tuesday or Wednesday work for a 20-minute call?
Tuesday works.
Hi, this is Alex, an AI voice agent from Flawless. Is now a good time?
Not really, I'm not interested.
Totally understand. Would it be okay if I followed up in a few months?
No thanks.
Of course, I'll make a note. Have a great day.
Hi, this is Alex, an AI voice agent. How can I help?
Can I speak with a real person?
Of course! Let me connect you with a team member right away.
Hi, I'm experiencing a brief delay. Let me connect you with someone who can help right away.

notes: First agent turn MUST contain AI disclosure
